title: CoAP block.rs uses .expect() for block number bounds
description:
lichen-coap/src/block.rs:273,374:
```rust
.expect("block number within bounds");
```

Block numbers are caller-provided. If validation is incomplete upstream, these expects become runtime bombs. Either document the bounds requirement in the function signature or return a Result.
close_reason: Added INFALLIBLE comments documenting block number bounds in block.rs next_block() and next_request_block()
